entities.name: Rusty Watering Can
entities.description: A battered old can. Still holds water.

entities.name: Saguaro Seedling
entities.description: Slow-growing desert giant. Requires warm zone.

entities.name: Broken Greenhouse
entities.description: Restore it to shelter cold-zone plants.

entities.name: Snail
entities.description: This is a snail, they eat plants and are eaten by birds

entities.name: Path to hidden cove
entities.description: a small path leading through the underbrush

nodes.speaker: Snail
nodes.text: That's good!  Have a lovely day

nodes.speaker: Snail
nodes.text: So sorry to hear, is there anything I can do for you today?

choices.text: Yes please, give me a bandaid

nodes.text: Here is a bandaid and a tissue to wipe your nose

nodes.speaker: Path to hidden cove
nodes.text: Hello, traveller. This is the path to the hidden cove
